brief_notes: Covers the same findings with clear writing but substantially reduced quantitative detail. DTT table uses qualitative TE descriptions ('High/Low') rather than numeric ratios. No 5' leader/CDS density ratio table. uORF accumulation results described in text only. Reporter assay results described qualitatively without ANOVA statistics or fluorescence values. Fly strain table is nice but the core results lack the numeric specificity of the skill version.
